assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Step 1.2 includes gcloud commands to get current cluster and node pool versions, and Step 2.1 includes kubectl commands to check node status, system pods, and failed pods

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Step 1.3 includes the exact command 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone=$ZONE --project=$PROJECT_ID --format="value(validMasterVersions[0:5])"'

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: No API deprecation check command is provided. The runbook does not include any kubectl or gcloud commands to check for deprecated APIs before upgrading

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade to 1.29 first (--master flag)
assertions.reason: Step 3.1 provides the exact command 'gcloud container clusters upgrade $CLUSTER_NAME --zone=$ZONE --project=$PROJECT_ID --master --cluster-version=1.29 --quiet'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Step 3.2 includes verification commands to check master version and cluster health, though it doesn't show expected output format

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for each node pool upgrade to 1.29
assertions.reason: Steps 4.1 and 4.4 provide exact commands for upgrading both default-pool and workload-pool to 1.29 using --node-pool flag

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Step 4.2 includes 'watch kubectl get nodes' and 'watch kubectl get pods --all-namespaces | grep -v Running | grep -v Completed' commands

assertions.expectation: Repeats the full sequence for 1.29→1.30 (sequential, not skipping)
assertions.reason: The runbook includes separate steps for upgrading control plane to 1.30 (Step 3.3) and both node pools to 1.30 (Steps 4.3 and 4.5), following the sequential pattern

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Step 5 includes comprehensive validation commands checking cluster versions, node status, system pods, and workload pods

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: Emergency Rollback section explains that control plane cannot be rolled back but provides command to create new node pool with previous version if needed
